race.comment: PINOT FOR MIKE (3) missed the placings first-up recently but was not too far from the winner when fifth over 1208m at Sale. Won at her only try second-up and will appreciate the drop in grade, so should be in the finish.  LISELLE'S LUCK (13) has been in the placings at her last two appearances, finishing second over 1400m at Morphettville Parks most recently. Sure to be competitive given the gun draw. TITAHI BAY (6) resumes off one trial but raced in stronger grade than this since the impressive maiden win, so expect her to be prominent here from the favourable gate. WHERE'S MY SOCK (2) filled a quinella slot at the first four runs this prep and gets back to the home track, where she's won and placed twice from five starts.
